title: Earthy Flaky Tunisian Date Flatbread
description: A traditional Tunisian flatbread filled with dates and spices, perfect for a night in with loved ones. This recipe features ground sugar and is nut-free-friendly.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, ground sugar, and salt.
Add the yeast and mix until well combined.
Gradually add the warm water and olive oil, kneading the dough for 10 minutes.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover, and let rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Punch down the dough and roll out into a large rectangle.
Spread the chopped dates evenly over the dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the edges over the dates to form a crust.
Brush the crust with olive oil and sprinkle with sesame seeds if desired.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.
